title: ECC-SDLC Test Case Schema
description: Structured test case data used in state.json and to render templates/sts-template.json.

testCaseId.description: Unique test case ID in format TC-NNN (zero-padded 3-digit integer, e.g., TC-001, TC-042)

linkedRequirements.description: Array of requirement IDs this test case validates. Every test case must link to at least one requirement.

linkedComponents.description: Optional array of design component IDs this test case verifies (e.g., CMP-API-001, DC-001)

description.description: Clear description of what this test case verifies

preconditions.description: Optional array of preconditions that must be met before test execution

steps.description: Ordered array of test execution steps

testData.description: Optional description of test data required

actualResult.description: Actual result after test execution (null if not yet run)

executionDate.description: Date the test was last executed (YYYY-MM-DD format)

executedBy.description: Name of person who executed the test

notes.description: Optional notes, comments, or failure details
